Title: Add Supabase project and env plumbing

Description: Email/password sign in and sign up screens matching the glass dashboard theme, with error and confirmation states

Description: HS256 verification of Supabase access tokens; protect /api/stats and /api/me; 401 on missing/expired/invalid token

Title: Repair and extend unit tests
Description: Fix broken AgentRouter tests, add API tests covering health check and auth rejection paths

Title: Run tests on pull requests
Description: Add pr trigger to Azure Pipeline so BuildAndTest runs on every PR; document branch policy to block merge on red

Title: Frontend lint and build in CI
Description: npm ci + oxlint + vite build as a parallel CI job

Title: Rewrite README
Description: Accurate architecture (React not Vue), auth setup, testing and CI documentation, professional tone
